title: Maispack
description: Maispack is a modpack for the official maishond discord community
body:
![Maiscraft header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00786a4f6735af4db628f69672b792342caff0a6.jpeg)

# Maispack

Maispack is a 1.20.1 modpack developed for the official maiscraft minecraft server.


### Description
The pack tries to enrich the vanilla game trough a set of mods that try to emulate mojangs style of game development.
Altough recommended it is not necesary to be apart of the community to play the modpack as it is quite fun.




### Mods
A few of the vanilla style minecrafts mods include:
- create
- farmers delight
- terralith and its counterparts
- seasons
- trinkets
- general optimization mods

### Texture pack
This modpack includes an in-house texture pack called maispack. It just changes the title of the game to a branded maiscraft variant. Nothing else is changed and all of this work is done by the creators of maispack
